payload.answer: I found a conflict: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. I will not update the memory until clarified.

entity_resolution.reason: The input refers to Sara, which matches an existing entity named Sara, but the stated relationship conflicts with the existing relationship and could also indicate a different person with the same name.

details: Detected conflicting relationship claims for Sara.

repair_options: Confirm the existing memory is correct: Sara is your daughter.
Replace the existing memory: Sara is your niece, not your daughter.
Keep both by clarifying they refer to different people named Sara.
Record a nuanced relationship if both are true in your family context.
